subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest Thy servants in the hands of those who have become heedless of Thy remembrance and have strayed from the shore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری عبادک بین ایدی الذین غفلوا عن ذکرک و بعدوا عن شاطی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
